title: Aurora, 61357, Glitzy Tots Polar Bear, 8In, Soft Toy, White
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: From Aurora's magical Glitzy Tots collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable White Polar Bear Soft Toy wth sparkle accents
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Glitzy Tots is Aurora World’s cute and cuddly range of collectable animals. Introducing our gorgeous white Snowman with sparkly gold accents on his nose, wearing a red Santa's hat. He is super soft and cuddly and will make the perfect gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
